SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: GAP_LTCP_COPAY_DAILY 
TYPE: 
NUM

1 = HPSA

COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2014. It will only be populated if the plan has an enhanced benefit design 
with extra coverage in the gap. 
The coverage gap is technically referred to as the initial coverage limit (ICL) for the Part D benefit. The
